summary: Completed testing of QuickBooks-style invoice viewer/editor feature. Found and FIXED 1 bug where duplicate GET /invoices/{id} endpoints existed - the simpler one was being matched first without edit_history/edit_count fields. All 10 backend tests pass, all frontend UI features verified working.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen readers - accessibility issue (minor)

bugs_fixed.issue: Duplicate GET /invoices/{id} endpoints - simpler one at line 907 was matched first, missing edit_history and edit_count
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Two @api_router.get('/invoices/{inv_id}') routes defined - FastAPI matches first one
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated the first endpoint (line 907) to include edit_history and edit_count from invoice_edits collection, removed duplicate endpoint at line 1793

passed_tests: BACKEND TESTS (10/10 passed, 1 skipped):
- GET /invoices/{id} returns edit_history and edit_count fields
- New invoice has edit_count of 0
- GET /invoices/by-number/{number} finds invoice across collections (invoices, sales, purchase_orders)
- GET /invoices/by-number returns 404 for non-existent invoice
- PUT /invoices/{id}/edit requires 'reason' field (returns 400 without it)
- PUT /invoices/{id}/edit succeeds with reason provided
- Edit creates history record in invoice_edits collection
- Edited invoice has 'edited' flag, last_edited_at, last_edited_by
- GET /invoices/{id}/edit-history returns edit history list
- Editing with reduced quantity returns stock to inventory
- (SKIPPED) Cannot edit voided invoice test - no voided invoices available
FRONTEND TESTS:
- Sales History page shows clickable blue invoice numbers
- Invoice detail modal opens on click with all invoice info
- Edit button present in modal
- Edit mode shows editable fields (qty, rate, customer, notes, freight, discount)
- 'Edit Reason Required' section with textarea visible in edit mode
- Save Changes button disabled without reason
- Save Changes button enables after reason entered
- Cancel button exits edit mode
- History button shows edit history count (e.g., 'History (2)')
- Payments page shows clickable blue invoice numbers in Open Invoices table
- 'Edited' badge with count (e.g., 'Edited (2x)') shown on edited invoices
- Orange edit pencil icon shown next to edited invoice numbers
critical_code_review_comments: Accessibility: InvoiceDetailModal should include DialogTitle and DialogDescription for screen readers
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed duplicate endpoint, consolidated edit_history/edit_count into main GET /invoices/{id}
/app/backend/tests/test_invoice_edit.py - Created comprehensive test suite for invoice edit feature
seed_data_creation: Used existing Test Customer (ID: 38511712-81e6-45ea-ac10-4a3ac6adad04) with invoices. Created test invoices during backend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice edit feature fully tested. Key implementation: 1) GET /invoices/{id} now returns edit_history array and edit_count from invoice_edits collection, 2) GET /invoices/by-number/{number} searches across invoices, sales, purchase_orders collections, 3) PUT /invoices/{id}/edit requires 'reason' field, creates edit history record, adjusts inventory, marks invoice as edited=true, 4) GET /invoices/{id}/edit-history returns full edit history. Frontend: InvoiceDetailModal component handles view/edit modes, PaymentsPage and SalesPage show clickable blue invoice links. Test credentials: admin/admin123. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_invoice_edit.py.

feature_implementation_details.invoice_detail: GET /api/invoices/{id} returns invoice with edit_history[] and edit_count
feature_implementation_details.invoice_by_number: GET /api/invoices/by-number/{number} searches invoices, sales, purchase_orders collections
feature_implementation_details.invoice_edit: PUT /api/invoices/{id}/edit requires {reason, _collection, ...fields}, adjusts inventory, creates invoice_edits record
feature_implementation_details.edit_history: GET /api/invoices/{id}/edit-history returns edit records with reason, changes, edited_by, timestamp
feature_implementation_details.frontend_integration: PaymentsPage and SalesPage import InvoiceDetailModal, invoice numbers are buttons with text-blue-600 class
